# Fracktal Works
> India's premier manufacturer of industrial and desktop 3D printers, additive manufacturing solutions, and 3D printing services.

## About
Fracktal Works specializes in designing and manufacturing advanced 3D printers including the Snowflake (high-precision desktop), Twin Dragon (dual-extrusion), Apollo SLS (production-grade SLS), and PrintStick adhesion solutions. Based in India, serving global markets.

## Products
- **Snowflake**: High-precision desktop 3D printer for engineering and prototyping | https://fracktal.in/snowflake/
- **Twin Dragon**: Speed and dual-material excellence for industrial applications | https://fracktal.in/twindragon/
- **Apollo SLS**: Production-grade Selective Laser Sintering for manufacturing | https://fracktal.in/apollo-sls-landing-page/
- **PrintStick**: Innovative bed adhesion solution for consistent prints | https://fracktal.in/printstick/
- **Julia**: Advanced 3D printing platform | https://fracktal.in/julia/
- **Fracktal Care**: Maintenance and support services | https://fracktal.in/fracktal-care/

## Services
- Custom 3D printing and prototyping
- Low-volume manufacturing
- Additive manufacturing consulting
- Technical support and maintenance
